ModMetaData.name: The Gods Are Real
ModMetaData.author: Kyle Givler
ModMetaData.description:
The Gods Are Real is a high-performance framework designed to fundamentally alter how the game tracks and responds to divine or cosmic events on the Rim.
The MVP (Minimum Viable Product) features: - Divine Influence System: Implements an optimized, low-overhead engine that tracks the favor of various deities, granting unique perks to loyal colonists and imposing severe consequences on the faithless. - Dynamic Boon and Bane Mechanics: Pawns can now receive "Divine Blessings" (stat buffs, unique abilities) or "Cosmic Curses" (environmental hazards, mood penalties) based on their actions and the favor of the gods. - Core Initialization: A robust, low-overhead hook into the RimWorld loading sequence to ensure seamless compatibility and minimal impact on TPS (Ticks Per Second). - Verified Integration: A stable foundation that confirms the mod is correctly loaded and ready to serve as the base for all future gameplay modules.
Core Focus: - Technical Stability: Developed with high-performance standards in mind to ensure zero stuttering during complex divine event calculations. - Engine Integration: Deep hooks into internal systems to provide a seamless and immersive experience.
Plans: - Expanding the divine pantheon with unique interactions. - Implementing complex, story-driven divine trials. - Continued optimization based on community feedback.
Source Code: https://github.com/JoyfulReaper/TheGodsAreReal
